latHint: Think doctor's orders and following advice carefully.
pivHint: MIND in this commandment means your intellect - love God with all of it. But think of a child who actually listens and obeys when a parent gives advice, rather than ignoring it. What word describes what that child does with the advice?
winText: You found it. Love God with all your MIND, and one who "MINDS" a warning HEEDS it - paying full attention either way.
lossText: The word was HEEDS. MIND was the pivot - your intellect in Matthew's greatest commandment, and what you do when you pay attention to a warning.
votdVerse: Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind.
passageText: When the Pharisees heard that Jesus had silenced the Sadducees, they got together. One of them, an expert in the law, tested him with this question: 'Teacher, which is the greatest commandment in the Law?' Jesus replied: 'Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind.' This is the first and greatest commandment.
